title: Unlawful Third-Country Data Transfer — Hardcoded Non-EEA Endpoint
description: Transferring personal data to third countries without an adequacy decision or appropriate safeguards violates GDPR Article 44. Hardcoded endpoints to non-EEA services without documented transfer mechanisms are non-compliant.

finding.message: Potential cross-border personal data transfer to '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}. Verify GDPR transfer mechanism.

references: Document the legal basis for every third-country transfer: adequacy decision, SCCs, BCRs, or derogation.
Maintain a Record of Processing Activities (RoPA) per Article 30 listing all data processors and their locations.
Prefer EU/EEA-based service providers or processors with active EU SCCs where possible.
EDPB Recommendations 01/2020 on measures that supplement transfer tools.
